message:
refactor(scheduler): extract backoff timeout classification into enum-driven decision function

Replace the nested if-else chain in the backoff timeout parking logic with a
structured BackoffTimeoutDecision enum and classify_backoff_timeout_decision()
function. This makes the three possible outcomes — ParkTimeout, SkipShort-
FollowerTimeout, and DeadlineDue — explicit and testable in isolation.

- Add BackoffTimeoutDecision enum with three variants capturing the full
  decision space for whether to park, skip, or break on a timer deadline.
- Extract classify_backoff_timeout_decision() that combines deadline comparison
  and the existing should_skip_backoff_timeout_park() check into a single
  pure function returning the enum.
- Refactor the inner backoff loop in ThreeLaneWorker to match on the enum
  instead of nesting conditionals, improving readability.
- Add comprehensive unit test covering all five interesting cases: deadline due,
  short follower (skip), threshold follower (skip), long follower (park), and
  short leader (park — leaders never skip).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
